description: Handle Tiny webhook tipo nota_fiscal to transition orders from aguardando_nf to pendente, saving DANFE URL and chave de acesso

userStories.title: Add obterNotaFiscal to tiny-api.ts
userStories.description: As the system, I need to fetch invoice details from Tiny API to resolve which order a nota fiscal belongs to when the fast-path match fails.
acceptanceCriteria: Add async function obterNotaFiscal(token: string, notaId: number) to src/lib/tiny-api.ts
Calls GET /notas/{notaId} on the Tiny v3 API
Returns object with at least: id, origem: { id: string, tipo: string }
Add corresponding TypeScript interface TinyNotaFiscal with the returned fields
Uses existing tinyFetch helper with rate limiting
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create NF webhook handler (nf-webhook-handler.ts)
userStories.description: As the system, I need an isolated handler for nota_fiscal webhooks that matches the NF to an order and transitions it from aguardando_nf to pendente.
acceptanceCriteria: Create new file src/lib/nf-webhook-handler.ts
Export async function handleNfWebhook(payload, empresaId: string): Promise<void>

Define and export NfWebhookPayload interface: { cnpj: string, tipo: string, dados: { idNotaFiscalTiny: number, numero?: string, serie?: string, urlDanfe?: string, chaveAcesso?: string, dataEmissao?: string, valorNota?: number } }
Step 1 - Dedup: upsert siso_webhook_logs with dedup_key = 'nf_{idNotaFiscalTiny}', skip if already processed
Step 2 - Fast-path match: SELECT from siso_pedidos WHERE nota_fiscal_id = idNotaFiscalTiny (cast to bigint)
Step 3 - Fallback match: call obterNotaFiscal from tiny-api.ts, check origem.tipo = 'venda', then find pedido by origem.id. If origem.tipo != 'venda', log info and return (ignore non-sale invoices)
Step 4 - Race condition: if no pedido found, save webhook_log with status = 'aguardando_pedido' for later retry

Step 5 - UPDATE siso_pedidos SET status_separacao = 'pendente', url_danfe = dados.urlDanfe, chave_acesso_nf = dados.chaveAcesso WHERE id = pedido_id AND status_separacao = 'aguardando_nf' (idempotent — skips if already past aguardando_nf)
Step 6 - Update webhook_log status to 'processado'
Uses createServiceClient() for DB access, logger for logging
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Route webhook tipo nota_fiscal to NF handler
userStories.description: As the system, I need the webhook route to discriminate by tipo BEFORE validating codigoSituacao so that nota_fiscal webhooks are routed to the NF handler.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/app/api/webhook/tiny/route.ts, add tipo discrimination at the top of POST handler BEFORE codigoSituacao validation
If tipo === 'nota_fiscal', call handleNfWebhook and return 200 OK
Existing pedido webhook flow (codigoSituacao validation, processWebhook) remains unchanged for non-NF webhooks
CNPJ-based empresa lookup (getEmpresaByCnpj) is shared — resolve empresa before branching by tipo
Return 200 OK for both success and graceful skip (NF not matching a sale order)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Reconcile pending NF webhooks in webhook-processor
userStories.description: As the system, I need the webhook-processor to check for pending NF webhooks when saving a new order, handling the race condition where NF arrives before the order is saved.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/lib/webhook-processor.ts, after saving the pedido to siso_pedidos, query siso_webhook_logs for entries with status = 'aguardando_pedido' and dedup_key LIKE 'nf_%'
Match pending NF webhooks to the just-saved pedido by nota_fiscal_id or pedido_id_tiny
If a matching pending NF webhook is found, immediately transition status_separacao from 'aguardando_nf' to 'pendente' and save url_danfe/chave_acesso_nf from the stored webhook payload
Update the matched webhook_log status from 'aguardando_pedido' to 'processado'
If no pending NF webhook found, do nothing (normal flow continues)
Typecheck passes
